subcodes.first_line: The divine bounty became manifest, and His mercy encompassed all. Through the hosts of His loving-kindness and bounty did He render aid, and the honored Shaykh— [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فضل الهی مجسم شد و رحمتش شامل بجنود عنایت و جودش مدد نمود و جناب شیخ علیه
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @praise and encouragement, @rejection, opposition and persecution
